parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.titulo,
  c.due_date,
  c.link_leilao,
  s.nome AS sublista,
  g.nome AS grupo,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.due_date - NOW())) / 86400.0 AS dias_restantes
FROM leilao_cards c
JOIN leilao_sublistas s ON s.id = c.sublista_id
JOIN leilao_grupos g ON g.id = s.grupo_id
WHERE 
  c.due_date IS NOT NULL
  AND c.due_date > NOW()
  AND (
    -- Leilão em exatamente 2 dias (janela de 1h)
    (c.due_date BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '2 days' - INTERVAL '30 minutes' 
                     AND NOW() + INTERVAL '2 days' + INTERVAL '30 minutes')
    OR
    -- Leilão em exatamente 1 dia (janela de 1h)
    (c.due_date BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '1 day' - INTERVAL '30 minutes' 
                     AND NOW() + INTERVAL '1 day' + INTERVAL '30 minutes')
    OR
    -- Leilão hoje nas próximas 1h
    (c.due_date BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' 
                     AND NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes')
  )
ORDER BY c.due_date ASC

nodes.name: 🗄️ Buscar leilões do dia no Supabase

  (sector, user_name, action, details, created_at)
